name: Guangdong Topstar Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Topstar Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of industrial robots in China. It provides standard linear robots, abnormal equipment, solution systems, automation solutions, energy saving and information planning products, and Huiqi robots. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Dongguan, the People's Republic of China.
